title: Payments made to constitute trust fund
doc_html:
§4694.  Payments made to constitute trust fund

Each municipal tax collector receiving money under the provisions of this Part shall deposit it in a special trust fund for the benefit of the holders and owners of the notes so paid.
doc_text:
§4694.  Payments made to constitute trust fund
Each municipal tax collector receiving money under the provisions of this Part shall deposit it in a special trust fund for the benefit of the holders and owners of the notes so paid.
